caption: A man with white hair and a white beard, dressed in a yellow long-sleeved garment and a red, white, and orange striped scarf, stands behind a podium draped in yellow fabric. He is positioned against a backdrop featuring stylized red architectural silhouettes of temples and green trees under a pale background. As the sequence progresses, the man speaks and gestures with his hands to emphasize his points. In the initial moments, he has both hands raised and open in an expressive gesture. He then lowers his arms, resting them on the yellow-covered podium. Later, he shifts his posture and gaze slightly as he continues to speak, maintaining a focused expression. The setting remains constant throughout the sequence, with no visible text, logos, or other people present in the frame.
